subject: ENGLISH
title: Identify the synonyms and antonyms of words.
objective: Identify the synonyms and antonyms of words.
introduction: Can you read a word without sounding it out? That's what we call a SIGHT WORD! Today we explore: Identify the synonyms and antonyms of words.. Let's build your reading superpowers! 🦸

vocabulary.definition: A common word you recognize instantly without sounding out.
A word that means the same as another word.
A word that means the opposite of another word.

activities.content: Identify the synonyms and antonyms of words.
